mapper.select: select * from batch.trigger_runtime_state where next_fire_time < #{horizon} and scheduled_fire_marker is null order by next_fire_time limit #{limit} for update skip locked
mapper.update: update batch.trigger_runtime_state set scheduled_fire_marker = #{marker}, scheduled_at = now(), version = version + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion} and scheduled_fire_marker is null

update batch.trigger_runtime_state set next_fire_time = #{nextFireTime}, last_fire_time = #{lastFireTime}, last_fire_status = #{lastFireStatus}, misfire_count = misfire_count + #{misfireDelta}, schedule_timezone = #{scheduleTimezone}, scheduled_local_date = #{scheduledLocalDate}, scheduled_local_time = #{scheduledLocalTime}, fire_sequence = #{fireSequence}, scheduled_fire_marker = null, scheduled_at = null, readiness_deferred_since = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}

update batch.trigger_runtime_state set next_fire_time = #{recheckAt}, readiness_deferred_since = #{deferredSince}, last_fire_status = 'WAITING_READINESS', scheduled_fire_marker = null, scheduled_at = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}

update batch.trigger_runtime_state set scheduled_fire_marker = null, scheduled_at = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = now() where scheduled_fire_marker is not null and scheduled_at < #{staleBefore}
mapper.insert:
insert into batch.trigger_runtime_state ( job_definition_id, tenant_id, job_code, next_fire_time, misfire_count, version, schedule_timezone, scheduled_local_date, scheduled_local_time, fire_sequence, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{jobDefinitionId}, #{tenantId}, #{jobCode}, #{nextFireTime}, 0, 1, #{scheduleTimezone}, #{scheduledLocalDate}, #{scheduledLocalTime},
#{fireSequence} 1 , now(), now() )
mapper.select: select * from batch.trigger_runtime_state where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by job_code
select id, job_definition_id, tenant_id, job_code from batch.trigger_runtime_state
mapper.update: update batch.trigger_runtime_state set next_fire_time = #{nextFireTime}, schedule_timezone = #{scheduleTimezone}, scheduled_local_date = #{scheduledLocalDate}, scheduled_local_time = #{scheduledLocalTime}, fire_sequence = 1, scheduled_fire_marker = null, scheduled_at = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
